categories.name: Quick Bites
categories.description: Irresistibly crisp, boldly spiced, and bursting with flavor—these small bites bring the energy of India's vibrant street food culture and home kitchens straight to your table.

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Sweet onion slices dipped in a seasoned batter, then fried till perfectly crisp. A familiar favorite, elevated with a subtle Indian twist.

items.name: Chilly Chips
items.description: Golden-fried potato wedges tossed in a smoky, red chili masala—spicy, bold, and packed with flavor in every bite.

items.name: Spicy Cheese Bites
items.description: Golden bites filled with molten cheese and a spark of green chili—crunchy on the outside, luxuriously soft inside.

items.name: Cheese Rolls
items.description: Crispy spring rolls filled with a creamy, spiced cheese mixture—golden on the outside, meltingly soft inside. A vegetarian favorite with a decadent twist.

categories.name: Quick Bites
categories.description: Irresistibly crisp, boldly spiced, and bursting with flavor—these small bites bring the energy of India's vibrant street food culture and home kitchens straight to your table.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop
items.description: Juicy chicken drumettes marinated in bold, rustic spices, fried to a crisp golden finish. Fiery on the outside, tender at the heart—this is street food at its most regal.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Wings
items.description: Marinated overnight in yogurt and robust Indian spices, then slow-roasted in the tandoor until smoky and succulent—pure magic from the clay oven.

items.name: Popcorn Chicken Masala
items.description: Tiny nuggets of chicken bursting with masala flavor, fried to a crispy finish—perfectly spiced and impossible to stop at one.

items.name: Squid Rings
items.description: Delicate squid rings with a light, crunchy coating, sprinkled with zesty chaat masala. A coastal classic brought to life with bold, tangy spice.

items.name: Prawn Butterfly
items.description: Plump prawns gently coated and shallow-fried till golden, served with a fresh, zingy chutney. A coastal delight with royal flair.

categories.name: Soups
categories.description: Begin your journey with a warm embrace—each spoonful a soul-soothing elixir steeped in Indian tradition.

items.name: Spiced Chicken Soup
items.description: A fragrant golden broth slow-simmered with ginger, garlic, and turmeric—warming, nourishing, and deeply comforting, like a bowl of home.

items.name: Lentil Soup (Dal Soup)
items.description: Earthy yellow lentils gently tempered with cumin and ghee—light yet fulfilling, a humble classic with timeless appeal.

items.name: Masala Tomato Soup
items.description: Ripe tomatoes slowly simmered with cumin, clove, and black pepper—rich, tangy, and infused with the comforting spice of Indian kitchens.

items.name: Chicken Shorba
items.description: A clear, aromatic chicken broth delicately spiced with crushed pepper and herbs—elegant, refreshing, and deeply restorative.

categories.name: Raita & Salads
categories.description: Cool, refreshing, and vibrant—our raitas and salads are the perfect companions to balance bold spices and elevate every bite. Crafted with fresh ingredients and traditional flavors.

items.name: Cucumber Raita
items.description: Creamy yogurt blended with crisp cucumber, a dash of cumin, and fresh coriander—cool, soothing, and refreshing.

items.name: Mix Raita
items.description: A vibrant medley of cucumber, onion, tomato, and herbs mixed into smooth yogurt—balanced, tangy, and packed with crunch.

items.name: Boondi Raita
items.description: Delicate, crispy boondi pearls soaked in spiced yogurt—light, flavorful, and a traditional favorite.

items.name: Green Salad
items.description: A crisp selection of seasonal greens, cucumber, tomato, and onion with a splash of lemon—clean, fresh, and revitalizing.

items.name: The Saffron Lounge Special Salad
items.description: An elevated mix of exotic greens, crunchy vegetables, toasted seeds, and a hint of spice—vibrant, refreshing, and chef-curated for flavor and flair.

categories.name: Starters
categories.description: Let the feast begin—an array of vibrant, spice-laden dishes to awaken every sense and stir the soul.

items.name: Papadum basket 2 pcs
items.description: Delicate, crunchy lentil crisps served with our house chutneys—a light, crackling start to your royal feast.

items.name: Vegetable Pakora
items.description: Crisp vegetable fritters, lightly spiced and golden-fried—comforting, crunchy, and utterly satisfying.

items.name: Vegetable Samosa
items.description: Golden pastry triangles filled with spiced potatoes and peas—timeless, satisfying, and every bite steeped in tradition.

items.name: Onion Bhaji
items.description: Crisp, tangled fritters of onion, cumin, and gram flour—light yet addictive, with every crunch revealing layers of flavor.

items.name: Paneer Pakora
items.description: Cubes of fresh cottage cheese cloaked in a spiced chickpea batter and fried—cheesy, crisp, and delightfully indulgent.

items.name: Chana Chaat
items.description: Chickpeas tossed with onions, chutneys, and coriander—a refreshing street food delight with tang, crunch, and spice.

items.name: Dahi Puri Chaat
items.description: Crisp puris filled with cool yogurt, potatoes, and sweet-sour chutneys—a burst of textures and flavors in every bite.

items.name: Aloo Tikki Chaat
items.description: Spiced potato patties topped with tangy tamarind, mint chutney, and yogurt—a rich, nostalgic street-side indulgence.

items.name: Chilli Paneer
items.description: Soft paneer cubes seared with peppers and green chilies—smoky, vibrant, and irresistibly spiced.

items.name: Ragda Petis
items.description: A beloved Mumbai street classic—crispy potato patties over spiced white peas curry, drizzled with chutneys and fresh coriander.

items.name: Chicken Pakora
items.description: Tender pieces of chicken coated in a spiced gram flour batter, fried until golden and crisp—a street-side staple elevated with finesse.

items.name: Fish Pakora
items.description: Fresh fish fillets enveloped in a seasoned batter, fried to a delicate crunch and finished with a sprinkle of chaat masala—coastal comfort at its finest.

items.name: Meat Samosa
items.description: Flaky pastries encasing spiced minced lamb—rich, hearty, and deeply aromatic.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Stir-fried chicken tossed with green chilies, onions, and bold Indian spices—a vibrant, fiery medley that lingers on the palate.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: Fiery morsels of chicken tossed with curry leaves, red chili, and secret house masalas—crackling with heat and bursting with flavor.

items.name: Seekh Kebab Starter
items.description: Skewered rolls of minced lamb, infused with fresh herbs and earthy spices, grilled to perfection—a kebab with bold character and centuries of tradition.

items.name: Chicken Puri
items.description: Tender chicken masala served over a golden, puffed puri—flavorful, tangy, and full of flair.

items.name: Chicken Chaat
items.description: Diced chicken marinated with chaat masala, lemon, and onions—zesty, spicy, and full of bite.

items.name: Prawn Puri
items.description: Delicately cooked prawns in a spiced gravy, resting on airy, golden puris—an elegant bite brimming with coastal charm.

items.name: Vegetable Manchurian
items.description: Golden-fried vegetable dumplings tossed in Indo-Chinese garlic sauce—crispy outside, juicy inside, and full of umami.

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Platter
items.description: A royal vegetarian medley—samosas, pakoras, bhajis, and more. Perfect for sharing and sampling a bit of everything.

items.name: Non-Veg Mixed Platter
items.description: A rich assortment of our top meat starters—chicken 65, pakoras, fish bites, and more. Ideal for indulgent beginnings.

categories.name: Main Curries
categories.description: Create your royal feast—select your preferred protein, then pair it with one of our masterfully crafted sauces. Each curry is a tribute to the age-old kitchens of India, where tradition, fire, and fragrance come together in perfect harmony.

items.name: Chicken Korma
items.description: Tender free-range chicken in a royal delight of ground cashews, cream, and coconut—velvety, golden, and gently spiced.

items.name: Chicken Mango Curry
items.description: Free-range chicken with sweet mango purée and subtle spices—fruity, fragrant, and comforting.

items.name: Chicken Badam Pasanda
items.description: Free-range chicken in ground almonds and rich cream sauce touched with cardamom—fit for a king.

items.name: Chicken Malai
items.description: Free-range chicken in silken, buttery sauce with delicate mild spices—subtle indulgence.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Free-range chicken in the timeless classic—onions, tomatoes, and warm spices slow-simmered.

items.name: Chicken Saag (Palak)
items.description: Free-range chicken in lush, earthy spinach curry—nutritious, comforting, and vibrant.

items.name: Chicken Dopiaza
items.description: Free-range chicken with double onions and sweet-tangy masala—balanced rustic flavors.

items.name: Chicken Madras
items.description: Free-range chicken in red chili heat with aromatic curry leaves—fiery and intense.

items.name: Chicken Vindaloo
items.description: Free-range chicken in vibrant vinegar and red chilies—spicy, tangy, and thrilling.

items.name: Chicken PHAL (Signature)
items.description: Free-range chicken in our signature blend—layered, rich, and fiery celebration of bold Indian flavor.

items.name: Lamb Korma
items.description: Juicy lamb in royal cashew, cream, and coconut sauce—velvety, golden, and gently spiced.

items.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
items.description: Lamb in Kashmiri classic—fiery red and aromatic with slow-cooked richness and warmth.

items.name: Lamb Vindaloo
items.description: Lamb in vibrant vinegar and red chilies—spicy, tangy, and thrillingly addictive.

items.name: Lamb PHAL (Signature)
items.description: Lamb in our signature blend—layered, rich, and fiery celebration of bold Indian flavor.

items.name: Fish Korma
items.description: Ocean-fresh fish in royal cashew, cream, and coconut sauce—velvety and gently spiced.

items.name: Fish Malabar
items.description: Fresh fish in coconut-based curry with traditional Malabar spices—tangy and aromatic.

items.name: Fish Vindaloo
items.description: Ocean-fresh fish in vibrant vinegar and red chilies—spicy, tangy, and thrilling.

items.name: Prawn Malabar
items.description: King prawns in coconut-based curry with traditional Malabar spices—tangy and aromatic.

items.name: Prawn Vindaloo
items.description: King prawns in vibrant vinegar and red chilies—spicy, tangy, and thrilling.

items.name: Vegetable Korma
items.description: Seasonal vegetables in royal cashew, cream, and coconut sauce—velvety and gently spiced.

items.name: Vegetable Saag (Palak)
items.description: Seasonal vegetables in lush, earthy spinach curry—nutritious, comforting, and vibrant.

items.name: Vegetable Jalfrezi
items.description: Seasonal vegetables with peppers, onions, and green chilies—bold kick and fresh crunch.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Fresh paneer in rich, creamy tomato-based curry—comforting and indulgent.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Grilled paneer in spicy, creamy tomato curry—smoky, rich, and full of character.

categories.name: Tandoori Sizzlers
categories.description: A showstopper! Bringing drama to your table, our sizzling platters arrive in a cloud of spice and steam—crackling, aromatic, and full of flair. Each dish is a grand performance of bold flavors and royal indulgence, served piping hot and impossible to ignore.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken (Half)
items.description: Juicy chicken on the bone, marinated overnight in yogurt, lime, and house-ground spices, then flame-roasted until charred outside and tender within. A classic, majestic feast.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken (Full)
items.description: Juicy chicken on the bone, marinated overnight in yogurt, lime, and house-ground spices, then flame-roasted until charred outside and tender within. A classic, majestic feast.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Boneless chicken chunks steeped in a vibrant marinade of yogurt, ginger, and masalas, roasted to golden perfection—succulent, smoky, and soul-satisfying.

items.name: Achari Chicken Tikka
items.description: Boneless chicken marinated in a bold, tangy blend of traditional pickling spices, then seared in the tandoor for a smoky, spicy punch.

items.name: Lamb Tikka
items.description: Prime lamb pieces marinated with royal spices and slow-roasted in the tandoor—rich, robust, and melt-in-your-mouth delicious.

items.name: Seekh Kebab
items.description: Skewered rolls of minced lamb, infused with fresh herbs and earthy spices, grilled to perfection—a kebab with bold character and centuries of tradition.

items.name: Tandoori King Prawns
items.description: Majestic king prawns bathed in a luxurious marinade of garlic, spices, and lime, then kissed by fire in the tandoor—juicy, smoky, and regal in every bite.

items.name: Tandoori Fish Tikka
items.description: Ocean-fresh fish fillets marinated in zesty spices, grilled to a smoky char—light, flaky, and bursting with bold coastal flavor.

items.name: Tandoori Soya Chaap
items.description: Plant-based protein marinated in robust spices and grilled in the tandoor—rich in flavor, satisfying in texture, and a favorite among vegetarians.

items.name: Paneer Tikka
items.description: Fresh cottage cheese cubes marinated in tangy spices, grilled with peppers and onions—soft, smoky, and bursting with flavor.

items.name: Tandoori Mixed Grill (Serves 2)
items.description: A royal platter of tandoori treasures—chicken tikka, lamb tikka, seekh kebab, tandoori chicken, and prawns—all served sizzling and aromatic. A true feast for the senses.

categories.name: Non-Vegetarian Specialties
categories.description: A curated collection of regional classics and royal recipes, each dish rich in heritage and flavor. From coastal comfort to northern indulgence, these specialties celebrate the depth and diversity of India's culinary traditions.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: A timeless favorite—chargrilled chicken tikka simmered in a vibrant, spiced tomato-cream sauce. Bold, smoky, and full of North Indian character.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: A beloved classic of tender chicken simmered in a silky tomato-butter sauce, finished with cream and a hint of fenugreek—smooth, rich, and endlessly comforting.

items.name: Chicken Chashni
items.description: A sweet and tangy Punjabi-style curry with a touch of flair—tandoori chicken tikka tossed in a luscious, honeyed tomato glaze with gentle spices.

items.name: Goan Fish Curry
items.description: A coastal gem from Goa—fresh fish fillets simmered in a tangy coconut-based curry with tamarind, mustard seeds, and curry leaves.

items.name: Afghani Chicken Curry
items.description: Creamy, nutty, and mildly spiced—this Mughal-inspired dish features chicken slow-cooked in a luxurious blend of yogurt, cashews, and aromatic spices.

items.name: Afghani Lamb Curry
items.description: Tender lamb simmered in a rich, velvety gravy of cream, saffron, and ground nuts—delicately spiced and full of regal depth.

categories.name: Vegetarian Specialties
categories.description: Each dish is a celebration of nature's bounty, cooked with devotion and layered with centuries-old Indian spices. Nourishing, flavorful, and deeply comforting—these vegetarian delights can easily be the star of your table.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Cubes of fresh, soft paneer simmered in a luscious tomato-based gravy—smoky, creamy, and spiced just right.

items.name: Saag Paneer
items.description: A velvety blend of spinach and Indian cottage cheese, enriched with subtle spices—a nourishing harmony of greens and cream.

items.name: Karahi Paneer
items.description: Paneer tossed with bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes in a bold masala—wok-tossed for smoky flavor and rustic charm.

items.name: Mutter Paneer
items.description: Garden peas and soft paneer cubes cooked in a spiced onion-tomato gravy—homestyle comfort with a touch of nostalgia.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: A buttery, rich tomato curry bursting with flavor and fragrance—where soft paneer meets indulgent luxury.

items.name: Chana Masala
items.description: Chickpeas slow-cooked with ginger, garlic, and garam masala—a hearty and soulful dish packed with warmth.

items.name: Tarka Daal
items.description: Yellow lentils tempered with sizzling garlic, cumin, and red chilies—simple, nourishing, and utterly satisfying.

items.name: Bombay Aaloo
items.description: Golden potatoes tossed with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and tangy spices—simple, bold, and bursting with street-style flair.

items.name: Saag Aaloo
items.description: Potatoes simmered in spiced spinach curry—earthy, warming, and full of flavor.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.description: Soft vegetable dumplings in a rich, creamy cashew and tomato sauce—indulgent, aromatic, and festive.

items.name: Veg Kofta
items.description: Delicate vegetable balls in a spiced curry sauce—hearty, flavorful, and full of rustic charm.

items.name: Bhindi Masala
items.description: Okra sautéed with onions, tomatoes, and traditional spices—dry, hearty, and packed with rustic northern flavor.

items.name: Veg Meat Kadhai
items.description: Plant-based protein chunks stir-fried with peppers and onions in a fiery tomato masala—bold, satisfying, and layered with smoky depth.

categories.name: Biryani & Rice
categories.description: Long-grain basmati rice infused with saffron, whole spices, and centuries of culinary heritage—each grain steeped in aroma and flavor. Whether layered with vegetables or tender meat, our biryanis and rice dishes are a fragrant journey through India's royal kitchens.

items.name: Vegetable Biryani
items.description: A vibrant medley of garden vegetables layered with fragrant basmati rice, saffron, and warming spices—slow-cooked to capture the soul of a traditional dum biryani.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Marinated chicken nestled between layers of golden rice and saffron, sealed and slow-cooked to perfection—every bite a royal indulgence.

items.name: Lamb Biryani
items.description: Succulent pieces of lamb marinated in traditional spices and slow-cooked between layers of aromatic basmati rice—deeply flavorful and tender to the core.

items.name: Prawn Biryani
items.description: Plump prawns gently spiced and nestled in saffron-kissed rice—an oceanic take on the royal biryani, delicate yet bold.

items.name: The Saffron Lounge Special Biryani
items.description: An opulent biryani experience—layered with aromatic rice, saffron, tender meats, and house-special masalas. Sealed and slow-cooked for a symphony of flavors fit for a feast.

items.name: Plain Basmati Rice
items.description: Fluffy, aromatic long-grain rice—steamed to gentle perfection and ready to soak up rich curries.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.description: Fragrant basmati tempered with roasted cumin seeds—simple, earthy, and utterly comforting.

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Steamed rice infused with the sweet aroma of coconut and tempered spices—light, fragrant, and coastal in spirit.

items.name: Pilau Rice
items.description: Basmati rice cooked with whole spices—golden, aromatic, and subtly spiced.

items.name: Saffron Special Rice
items.description: A golden celebration—basmati rice delicately kissed with royal saffron strands and a hint of cardamom.

items.name: Vegetable Rice
items.description: Lightly tossed with seasonal vegetables and gentle masalas—flavorful, colorful, and hearty.

items.name: Lemon Rice
items.description: A zesty South Indian classic—tangy, turmeric-hued rice with mustard seeds and curry leaves.

items.name: Kashmiri Pulao
items.description: A sweet and aromatic rice dish studded with dried fruits, nuts, and a whisper of saffron—fragrant, festive, and rich with Kashmiri flair.

categories.name: Breads
categories.description: From the heart of our tandoor to your table, these breads are soft, smoky, and full of soul. Handcrafted daily and baked to golden perfection, they are made to scoop, savor, and soak up every drop of curry royalty.

items.name: Plain Naan
items.description: Soft, pillowy flatbread—lightly charred and served warm to cradle every rich curry.

items.name: Garlic Naan
items.description: Infused with fresh garlic and brushed with butter, this naan adds a bold, aromatic flair to every bite.

items.name: Cheese Naan
items.description: Oozing with molten cheese and baked until golden—indulgent, creamy, and utterly satisfying.

items.name: Tandoori Roti
items.description: Whole wheat flatbread with a smoky char and hearty bite—a rustic favorite from the tandoor.

items.name: Keema Naan
items.description: Soft naan generously stuffed with spiced minced meat—bold, juicy, and bursting with royal flavor.

items.name: Tandoori Laccha Paratha
items.description: Multi-layered and flaky with a golden crisp—this spiral of delight is perfect for mopping up rich gravies.

items.name: Butter Naan
items.description: Fluffy naan brushed with creamy butter—simple, luxurious, and comforting.

items.name: Roti / Phulka
items.description: Soft, griddled whole wheat rounds—light, wholesome, and everyday soulful.

items.name: Methi Paratha
items.description: Earthy fenugreek-laced paratha—layered with flavor and lightly toasted to golden crispness.

items.name: Cheese & Garlic Naan
items.description: A decadent duet of rich cheese and fragrant garlic—melted and toasted into soft, golden perfection.

items.name: Pudina Paratha
items.description: Mint-kissed layers folded and crisped—cool, herbaceous, and vibrant.

items.name: Tandoori Naan
items.description: A traditional leavened flatbread with a soft heart and crisp edges—fresh from our clay oven.

items.name: Chilly Naan
items.description: Spiced with chopped green chilies—soft, fiery, and unforgettable.

items.name: Peshawari Naan
items.description: Stuffed with a sweet mix of coconut, raisins, and nuts—rich, aromatic, and royally indulgent.

items.name: Cheese Chilly Garlic Naan
items.description: A fiery, cheesy indulgence—stuffed with molten cheese, green chilies, and garlic, baked to spicy perfection.

items.name: The Saffron Lounge Special Cheese Garlic Coriander Keema Onion Naan
items.description: A royal feast in itself—lavishly stuffed with minced meat, cheese, garlic, coriander, and onions. Bold, aromatic, and truly luxurious.
items.image: /assets-main/menu/BREADS/The Saffron Lounge Special Cheese Garlic Coriander Keema Onion Naan.png

categories.name: Vegan Mains
categories.description: A celebration of India's vibrant plant-based cuisine—bold spices, rustic textures, and deep, soulful flavors, crafted without dairy or animal products.

items.name: Veg Meat Kadhai
items.description: Succulent plant-based protein simmered with bell peppers, onions, and bold spices in a thick, tangy tomato masala—fiery, hearty, and full of character.

items.name: Mix Veg
items.description: A wholesome medley of seasonal vegetables cooked in a mildly spiced, homestyle curry—colorful, comforting, and full of soul.

items.name: Chana Masala
items.description: Chickpeas slow-cooked in a robust onion-tomato gravy with warming spices—earthy, tangy, and deeply satisfying.

items.name: Aaloo Gobhi
items.description: Cauliflower and potatoes tossed in turmeric, cumin, and fresh herbs—dry-fried for that perfect rustic bite.

items.name: Saag Aaloo
items.description: Tender potatoes simmered in spiced spinach puree—lush, vibrant, and rich with iron and flavor.

items.name: Mushroom Masala
items.description: Button mushrooms cooked in a rich, spiced tomato-onion gravy—earthy, creamy (without cream), and deliciously umami.

items.name: Daal Tadka
items.description: Golden lentils tempered with garlic, cumin, and red chilies—simple, smoky, and soul-warming.

items.name: Veg Kofta
items.description: Crisp vegetable dumplings in a spiced tomato-cashew gravy—luxurious, satisfying, and dairy-free indulgence.

items.name: Bhindi Bhaji
items.description: Okra stir-fried with onions, tomatoes, and house spices—dry, flavorful, and full of texture.

categories.name: Drinks
categories.description: Crafted to cool, soothe, and enchant—our drinks are steeped in tradition and poured with love. Whether it's a creamy lassi or a spiced tea, each sip is a celebration of India's vibrant spirit.

items.name: Mango Lassi
items.description: A velvety blend of sweet mango and churned yogurt—smooth, golden, and luxuriously cooling.

items.name: Salted Lassi
items.description: A classic from Indian homes—savory, creamy yogurt drink kissed with roasted cumin for a refreshing twist.

items.name: Sweet Lassi
items.description: Light, creamy, and delicately sweet—this chilled yogurt elixir is a gentle hug for your palate.

items.name: Masala Chai
items.description: Fragrant black tea simmered with warming spices and milk—soul-stirring, comforting, and deeply aromatic.

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.description: Familiar fizzy favorites—served chilled to balance the rich warmth of your meal.

items.name: Lemon Soda
items.description: Sparkling, tangy, and enlivened with fresh lemon juice—a zesty refresher with every bubbly sip.

items.name: Masala Soda
items.description: India's beloved spiced fizz—punchy, zesty, and packed with chatpata (tangy-spicy) flair.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Sweetened with tradition, scented with saffron, and served with warmth—our desserts are a tribute to India's love affair with indulgence.

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Soft, golden dumplings soaked in rose-scented syrup—warm, melt-in-the-mouth, and utterly divine.

items.name: Gajar Halwa
items.description: Carrots lovingly slow-cooked in milk, ghee, and sugar, studded with nuts—warm, rich, and soul-stirring.

items.name: Mango Kulfi
items.description: Traditional Indian ice cream—dense, creamy, and frozen with flavor of mango. A royal finale.

items.name: Pistachio Kulfi
items.description: Traditional Indian ice cream—dense, creamy, and frozen with flavors of pistachio. A royal finale.

categories.name: Kids' Menu
categories.description: Little bites, big smiles—Indian flavors made gentle, joyful, and just right for young appetites.

items.name: Cheesy Naan Pizza
items.description: A fun twist—naan bread topped with melted cheese and a light tomato masala base. Perfect for little hands!

items.name: Mini Butter Chicken Pizza
items.description: Naan pizza with creamy butter chicken sauce and cheese—mild, rich, and kid-friendly.

items.name: Mini Butter Paneer Pizza
items.description: A vegetarian version with soft paneer in a buttery tomato sauce, topped with cheese on a warm naan base.

items.name: Fish Fingers & Chips
items.description: Crispy fish fingers served with golden fries—a classic kids' favorite.

items.name: Chicken Nuggets & Chips
items.description: Juicy chicken nuggets paired with a side of fries—crunchy, satisfying, and always a hit.

items.name: Mini Poppadoms & Dip
items.description: Tiny lentil crisps with a mango chutney—crunchy, sweet, and fun to munch.

items.name: Plain Fries
items.description: Lightly salted and golden-fried—simple, crispy goodness.

items.name: Cheesy Fries
items.description: Fries topped with gooey melted cheese—extra fun, extra flavor.

items.name: Mango Lassi
items.description: A sweet, creamy yogurt drink made with ripe mango—cooling and loved by kids.

items.name: Vanilla Ice Cream with Chocolate Sauce
items.description: A classic scoop with a chocolatey drizzle—perfect for happy endings.
